alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbon-sulfur bond.
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfur compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a potassium ion.
alternative_parents.name: Organic potassium salts

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metal atom in its ionic form.
class.name: Organic metal salts

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as organic alkali metal salts. These are organic salts of an alkali metal. The alkali metal atom is usually in its ionic form.

direct_parent.description: Organic salts of an alkali metal. The alkali metal atom is usually in its ionic form.
direct_parent.name: Organic alkali metal salts

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic salts of an alkali metal. The alkali metal atom is usually in its ionic form.
subclass.name: Organic alkali metal salts

superclass.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
superclass.name: Organic salts
